_schema.nodes: Array of company nodes. Fields: id (string), name (string), ticker (string), sector (string), marketCap (number, billions USD), price (number, USD), track (string - matches a track id), description (string)
_schema.edges: Array of relationships. Fields: source (node id), target (node id), type (string: 'partnership'|'competitor'|'supplier'|'investor')
_schema.tracks: Investment track definitions. Fields: id (string), label (string), color (CSS color string)

nodes.name: NVIDIA Corporation
nodes.description: Dominant GPU maker powering AI training and inference workloads worldwide.

nodes.name: Taiwan Semiconductor
nodes.description: World's largest contract chip manufacturer, foundry for NVIDIA, Apple, and AMD.

nodes.name: Advanced Micro Devices
nodes.description: GPU and CPU competitor challenging NVIDIA in the AI accelerator market.

nodes.name: Microsoft Corporation
nodes.description: Azure cloud platform and majority investor in OpenAI, integrating AI across product suite.

nodes.name: Alphabet Inc.
nodes.description: Google Cloud and Gemini AI compete directly with Microsoft and OpenAI.

nodes.name: Arm Holdings
nodes.description: Chip architecture licensor; designs power nearly all mobile and edge AI devices.

nodes.name: Block Inc.
nodes.description: Payments and financial services for SMBs and consumers via Square and Cash App.

nodes.name: PayPal Holdings
nodes.description: Global digital payments leader undergoing strategic transformation under new leadership.

nodes.name: Coinbase Global
nodes.description: Leading U.S. crypto exchange and custody platform, regulated by SEC.

nodes.name: Affirm Holdings
nodes.description: Buy-now-pay-later platform with major partnerships including Amazon and Shopify.

nodes.name: Moderna Inc.
nodes.description: Pioneer in mRNA therapeutics, expanding beyond COVID vaccines into oncology.

nodes.name: CRISPR Therapeutics
nodes.description: Gene editing biotech with first approved CRISPR therapy for sickle cell disease.

nodes.name: Roivant Sciences
nodes.description: Biopharma holding company building and spinning out subsidiary Vants.

nodes.name: Recursion Pharmaceuticals
nodes.description: Uses AI and high-throughput biology to decode disease and discover drugs.

nodes.name: Palantir Technologies
nodes.description: AI-powered data analytics platform for government, defense, and enterprise.

nodes.name: SentinelOne
nodes.description: AI-native cybersecurity platform for endpoint and cloud protection.

nodes.name: CrowdStrike Holdings
nodes.description: Cloud-delivered endpoint security and threat intelligence leader.

nodes.name: Kratos Defense
nodes.description: Builds unmanned systems, satellites, and hypersonic test vehicles for the DoD.

nodes.name: Enphase Energy
nodes.description: Microinverter and home energy management systems for residential solar.

nodes.name: Bloom Energy
nodes.description: Solid oxide fuel cell systems for clean, on-site power generation.

nodes.name: ChargePoint Holdings
nodes.description: Largest EV charging network operator in North America and Europe.
